The editor ha.s taken this chart on 20·8-1964 for offerlng prediction.
The star at the time was Utharashada and the day was Thursday. Hence

Sun govemed the star and Satum owned the Rasi.
Mars. has nothing to do with this time. Hence, one is to reject the
moon sign under the reign of Mars, but consider the Lagna Leo is the
stronger of the two.
